reason: All 108 FRs present under fr_tests: with at least one test function each. All test names follow test_frNN_xxx zero-padded convention. cross_cutting sections (security, kpi, deployment, api_completeness, version_consistency) are valid extensions not conflicting with FR tests. format_version 1.1 correct.
citations: TEST_INVENTORY FR-16: test_fr16_retrospective_block_event_in_security_logs — consistent with SRS FR-16 injection_retrospective_block in security_logs
TEST_INVENTORY FR-61: test_fr61_auditor_pii_decrypt_returns_403 — consistent with SRS FR-61 and TRACEABILITY_MATRIX
TEST_INVENTORY FR-71: test_fr71_all_11_metrics_scraped — consistent with SRS FR-71 listing exactly 11 Prometheus metrics
TEST_INVENTORY FR-82: test_fr82_gin_tsvector_index_exists — consistent with SRS FR-82 GIN index on knowledge_chunks
TEST_INVENTORY FR-87: test_fr87_rotate_old_token_valid_24hr — consistent with SRS FR-87 M2M rotate 24hr overlap
TEST_INVENTORY FR-99: test_fr99_embedding_down_uses_tsvector_fallback — consistent with SRS FR-99 level_embedding_down lateral circuit breaker
TEST_INVENTORY FR-100: test_fr100_clamav_down_503_file_scan_unavailable — consistent with SRS FR-100 ClamAV fail-secure
TEST_INVENTORY cross_cutting.security: test_redteam_auditor_pii_decrypt_blocked_403 — consistent with FR-61 RBAC requirement

gaps.message: FR-99 lateral level naming ambiguity inherited
cross_cutting.kpi and version_consistency are acceptable extensions beyond FR scope
FR-23 empty_whitelist_400_warning uses 400 status code — correct per SRS FR-23
FR-77 uses 2.5s threshold for searchable SLA; 2.0s is internal asyncio timeout — not a contradiction
